The '''''Tiger''''' was an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

''Tiger'' was assigned to rendezvous with [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|shuttles]] near [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]] and transfer [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] prisoners of war from the prison colony. There were to be five shuttles carrying the prisoners and only two [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighter]]s as escort. The Rebel Alliance learned of the prisoner transfer and dispatched five of their own shuttles along with three [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]] as escort to mount a [[Rescue mission to Kessel|rescue]].

The Y-wings destroyed the TIE escorts and disabled the shuttles before engaging and destroying several [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE/IN starfighters]] which had launched from ''Tiger'' while the Rebel shuttles rescued the prisoners. The Star Destroyer itself was too far away to prevent the rescue.

The participating Rebel pilots were awarded the [[Corellian Cross/Legends|Corellian Cross]] for their bravery and the mission was later recreated as a simulation for use in training new pilots.

==Behind the scenes==
Though referred to as '''''Predator''''' in the mission description in [[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']], the ship is identified as '''''Tiger''''' in the mission itself. Since ''Tiger'' is also used in ''[[X-Wing: The Official Strategy Guide]]'', ''Tiger'' is taken here as the correct name.
